mapper.select: select * from testinfotable, testtable where testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id

select * from testinfo__room, roomtable, testinfotable, testtable where testinfo__room.room_id = roomtable.room_id and testinfo__room.testinfo_id = testinfotable.testinfo_id and testinfotable.test_id = testtable.test_id and testinfotable.testinfo_id = #{testinfo_id}
